message.content:
You are working in /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster. You must write code. NEVER use `cd`.

## Task: Update RBSDC-depot_create.adoc spec for simplified stdin flow

Edit `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/lenses/RBSDC-depot_create.adoc`.

The depot_create code is being simplified: the verbose inline setup guide is being removed from depot_create itself, replaced by a separate manual guide (`rbgm_gitlab_setup()` via tabtarget `rbw-Pgl`). The depot_create now just validates and prompts tersely.

### Changes needed:

1. **Update the rubric repo URL validation step** (currently around lines 22-29): When URL is missing or not gitlab.com, the spec should mention showing `buc_next "rbw-Pgl"` before dying, instead of just dying with a long error message.

Replace the current text around lines 22-29:
```
.. {rbbc_require}
URL begins with `https://gitlab.com/` or {rbbc_fatal} "only GitLab is supported for CB v2 connections (GitHub classic PATs grant repo scope across ALL repositories; GitLab project access tokens are inherently repository-scoped)"
```

With:
```
.. {rbbc_require}
URL begins with `https://gitlab.com/` or {rbbc_show} tabtarget hint for `rbw-Pgl` (GitLab setup guide) then {rbbc_fatal} "Cannot proceed without GitLab rubric repo"
```

2. **Simplify the stdin section** (around lines 30-41): Remove the verbose inline guide description. Replace with a terse description.

Replace the current block:
```
//axhop_parameter_from_stdin
. *GitLab Project Access Token (stdin)*:
.. Read one line from stdin: `Â«GITLAB_TOKENÂ»`
.. If stdin is empty, {rbbc_show} inline setup guide:
... Why GitLab (not GitHub): GitHub classic PATs grant `repo` scope across ALL repositories the token owner can access. Fine-grained PATs are not supported by CB v2 (Google Issue Tracker #343223837). GitLab project access tokens are inherently repository-scoped.
... Step 1: Create a GitLab account at `gitlab.com` (if needed)
... Step 2: Create a project for the rubric repo
... Step 3: Create a project access token: Project Settings â†’ Access Tokens â†’ Add new token â€” Name: descriptive (e.g. `rb-depot`), Role: Maintainer, Scopes: `api` (includes `read_api`) â€” Click 'Create project access token' and copy immediately
... Show invocation pattern: `printf '%s\n' "$TOKEN" | <tabtarget> <depot_name>`
... {rbbc_fatal}
"Provide GitLab project access token via stdin and re-run"
```

With:
```
//axhop_parameter_from_stdin
. *GitLab Project Access Token (stdin)*:
.. {rbbc_show}
rubric repo URL
.. Read one line from stdin: `Â«GITLAB_TOKENÂ»`
.. If empty, {rbbc_show} tabtarget hint for `rbw-Pgl` (GitLab setup guide) then {rbbc_fatal} "Token is empty"
```

3. Also update the URL missing case (around line 25-28). Currently:
```
.. {rbbc_require}
{rbrr_rubric_repo_url}
is set in regime (`RBRR_RUBRIC_REPO_URL` in `rbrr.env`)
```

Change to:
```
.. {rbbc_require}
{rbrr_rubric_repo_url}
is set in regime (`RBRR_RUBRIC_REPO_URL` in `rbrr.env`) or {rbbc_show} tabtarget hint for `rbw-Pgl` then {rbbc_fatal} "Cannot proceed without GitLab rubric repo"
```

Read the file first, then use Edit to make these changes.

    35â†’... Step 1: Create a GitLab account at `gitlab.com` (if needed)

    38â†’... Show invocation pattern: `printf '%s\n' "$TOKEN" | <tabtarget> <depot_name>`

    62â†’.. Generate project ID: `rbw-Â«INPUT_DEPOT_NAMEÂ»-Â«TIMESTAMPÂ»`

    64â†’as `Â«DEPOT_PROJECT_IDÂ»`

    68â†’//axhos_step
    69â†’. *Create Depot Project*:
    70â†’.. {rbbc_submit}
    71â†’link:https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v3/projects/create[projects.create] with:

    84â†’.. Set billingAccountName: `billingAccounts/{rbrp_billing_account_id}`
    85â†’.. {rbbc_require}
    86â†’HTTP 200 response confirming billing linkage
    87â†’
    88â†’//axhos_step
    89â†’. *Get Depot Project Number*:
    90â†’.. {rbbc_call}
    91â†’link:https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v3/projects/get[projects.get] for `Â«DEPOT_PROJECT_IDÂ»`
    92â†’.. {rbbc_store}
    93â†’`Â«PROJECT_NUMBERÂ»` from `.name` field (CRM v3 returns `projects/{number}`)
    94â†’.. {rbbc_require}
    95â†’valid numeric project number after extracting from name
    96â†’
    97â†’//axhos_step
    98â†’. *Enable Depot Project APIs*:
    99â†’.. For each service in [`artifactregistry`, `cloudbuild`, `containeranalysis`, `iam`, `secretmanager`, `serviceusage`, `storage`]:
   100â†’... Execute
   101â†’{rbtoe_api_enable}
   102â†’with service name and `Â«DEPOT_PROJECT_IDÂ»`
   103â†’.. {rbbc_require}
   104â†’all APIs enabled successfully
   105â†’
   106â†’//axhos_step
   107â†’. *Verify IAM Propagation*:

   110â†’link:https://cloud.google.com/artifact-registry/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.repositories/list[artifactregistry.repositories.list] for `Â«DEPOT_PROJECT_IDÂ»` in `{rbrr_gcp_region}`
   111â†’.. Poll at `RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC` intervals until HTTP 200 or `RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC` timeout
   112â†’.. {rbbc_require}
   113â†’HTTP 200 response confirming IAM propagation complete
   114â†’.. {rbbc_fatal}
   115â†’if timeout: "IAM propagation timeout - artifactregistry API not accessible"
   116â†’
   117â†’//axhos_step
   118â†’. *Create Build Bucket*:
   119â†’.. Construct bucket name: `rbw-Â«INPUT_DEPOT_NAMEÂ»-bucket`
   120â†’.. {rbbc_call}
   121â†’link:https://cloud.google.com/storage/docs/json_api/v1/buckets/insert[storage.buckets.insert] with:
   122â†’... name: `rbw-Â«INPUT_DEPOT_NAMEÂ»-bucket`
   123â†’... location: `{rbrr_gcp_region}`
   124â†’... project: `Â«DEPOT_PROJECT_IDÂ»`
   125â†’... lifecycle rule: delete objects after 1 day
   126â†’.. {rbbc_store}
   127â†’`Â«BUILD_BUCKETÂ»` as created bucket name
   128â†’
   129â†’//axhos_step
   130â†’. *Create Container Repository*:
   131â†’.. Construct repository name: `rbw-Â«INPUT_DEPOT_NAMEÂ»-repository`
   132â†’.. {rbbc_submit}
   133â†’link:https://cloud.google.com/artifact-registry/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.repositories/create[artifactregistry.repositories.create] with:
   134â†’... repositoryId: `rbw-Â«INPUT_DEPOT_NAMEÂ»-repository`
   135â†’... format: `DOCKER`
   136â†’... location: `{rbrr_gcp_region}`
   137â†’... parent: `projects/Â«DEPOT_PROJECT_IDÂ»/locations/{rbrr_gcp_region}`
   138â†’.. {rbbc_await}
   139â†’returned operation
   140â†’.. {rbbc_store}
   141â†’`Â«GAR_REPOSITORYÂ»` as created repository name
   142â†’
   143â†’//axhos_step
   144â†’. *Create
   145â†’{rbtr_mason}
   146â†’Service Account*:
   147â†’.. NOTE: The
   148â†’{rbtr_mason}
   149â†’replaces Cloud Build's implicit service account to provide deterministic permissions and predictable authorization within the depot infrastructure.
   150â†’.. {rbbc_call}
   151â†’link:https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.serviceAccounts/create[iam.serviceAccounts.create] with:
   152â†’... accountId: `mason-Â«INPUT_DEPOT_NAMEÂ»`
   153â†’... displayName: `Mason for RB Depot: Â«INPUT_DEPOT_NAMEÂ»`
   154â†’... project: `Â«DEPOT_PROJECT_IDÂ»`
   155â†’.. {rbbc_store}
   156â†’`Â«MASON_EMAILÂ»` from response `.email` field
   157â†’
   158â†’//axhos_step
   159â†’. *Configure
   160â†’{rbtr_mason}
   161â†’Permissions*:
   162â†’.. {rbbc_call}
   163â†’link:https://cloud.google.com/artifact-registry/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.repositories/setIamPolicy[repositories.setIamPolicy] for `Â«GAR_REPOSITORYÂ»`
   164â†’... Add `serviceAccount:Â«MASON_EMAILÂ»` with `roles/artifactregistry.writer`
   165â†’.. {rbbc_call}
   166â†’link:https://cloud.google.com/storage/docs/json_api/v1/buckets/setIamPolicy[buckets.setIamPolicy] for `Â«BUILD_BUCKETÂ»`
   167â†’... Add `serviceAccount:Â«MASON_EMAILÂ»` with `roles/storage.objectViewer`
   168â†’.. {rbbc_call}
   169â†’link:https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v3/projects/setIamPolicy[projects.setIamPolicy] for `Â«DEPOT_PROJECT_IDÂ»`
   170â†’... Add `serviceAccount:Â«MASON_EMAILÂ»` with `roles/viewer`
   171â†’... Add `serviceAccount:Â«MASON_EMAILÂ»` with `roles/logging.logWriter`
   172â†’
   173â†’//axhos_step
   174â†’. *Enable Cloud Build service agent to impersonate
   175â†’{rbtr_mason}*:
   176â†’.. {rbbc_call}
   177â†’link:https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.serviceAccounts/setIamPolicy[serviceAccounts.setIamPolicy] for `Â«MASON_EMAILÂ»`
   178â†’.. Add member: `serviceAccount:service-Â«PROJECT_NUMBERÂ»@gcp-sa-cloudbuild.iam.gserviceaccount.com`
   179â†’.. Grant role: `roles/iam.serviceAccountTokenCreator`
   180â†’.. NOTE: Cloud Build service agent is Google-provisioned, not newly created.
   181â†’.. {rbbc_require}
   182â†’IAM binding successful (enables Cloud Build to execute as Mason)
   183â†’
   184â†’//axhos_step
   185â†’. *Store GitLab credentials in Secret Manager (3 secrets)*:
   186â†’.. Generate `Â«WEBHOOK_SECRETÂ»` as random UUID via `uuidgen` (output to temp file, read with bash builtin)
   187â†’.. Base64-encode `Â«GITLAB_TOKENÂ»` (used for both api and read_api secrets)
   188â†’.. Base64-encode `Â«WEBHOOK_SECRETÂ»`
   189â†’.. For each secret (`RBGC_CBV2_API_TOKEN_SECRET_NAME`, `RBGC_CBV2_READ_TOKEN_SECRET_NAME`, `RBGC_CBV2_WEBHOOK_SECRET_NAME`):
   190â†’... {rbbc_call}
   191â†’link:https://cloud.google.com/secret-manager/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.secrets/create[secrets.create] with:
   192â†’.... parent: `projects/Â«DEPOT_PROJECT_IDÂ»`
   193â†’.... secretId: secret name constant
   194â†’.... body: `{"replication": {"automatic": {}}}`
   195â†’... {rbbc_call}
   196â†’link:https://cloud.google.com/secret-manager/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.secrets.versions/add[secrets.versions.add] with appropriate base64 payload
   197â†’... {rbbc_store}
   198â†’`Â«SECRET_VERSIONÂ»` from response `.name` field
   199â†’.. NOTE: api and read_api secrets store the same token value (GitLab `api` scope includes `read_api`). Webhook secret is auto-generated UUID.
   200â†’
   201â†’//axhos_step
   202â†’. *Grant Cloud Build service agent Secret Manager access (all 3 secrets)*:
   203â†’.. Construct service agent: `service-Â«PROJECT_NUMBERÂ»@gcp-sa-cloudbuild.iam.gserviceaccount.com`
   204â†’.. For each of the 3 secrets:
   205â†’... {rbbc_call}
   206â†’link:https://cloud.google.com/secret-manager/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.secrets/setIamPolicy[secrets.setIamPolicy]
   207â†’... Add Cloud Build service agent with `roles/secretmanager.secretAccessor`
   208â†’.. {rbbc_require}
   209â†’all IAM bindings successful
   210â†’
   211â†’//axhos_step
   212â†’. *Grant Cloud Build service agent connection admin*:
   213â†’.. {rbbc_call}
   214â†’link:https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v3/projects/setIamPolicy[projects.setIamPolicy] for `Â«DEPOT_PROJECT_IDÂ»`
   215â†’.. Add `serviceAccount:service-Â«PROJECT_NUMBERÂ»@gcp-sa-cloudbuild.iam.gserviceaccount.com` with `roles/cloudbuild.connectionAdmin`
   216â†’.. {rbbc_require}
   217â†’IAM binding successful
   218â†’
   219â†’//axhos_step
   220â†’. *Create CB v2 GitLab Connection*:
   221â†’.. Construct connection name: `rbw-Â«INPUT_DEPOT_NAMEÂ»Â«RBGC_CBV2_CONNECTION_SUFFIXÂ»` (suffix is `-gitlab`)
   222â†’.. {rbbc_call}
   223â†’link:https://cloud.google.com/build/docs/api/reference/rest/v2/projects.locations.connections/create[connections.create] with:
   224â†’... parent: `projects/Â«DEPOT_PROJECT_IDÂ»/locations/{rbrr_gcp_region}`
   225â†’... connectionId: `rbw-Â«INPUT_DEPOT_NAMEÂ»-gitlab`
   226â†’... body:
   227â†’+
   228â†’----
   229â†’{
   230â†’  "gitlabConfig": {
   231â†’    "authorizerCredential": {
   232â†’      "userTokenSecretVersion": "Â«API_TOKEN_SECRET_VERSIONÂ»"
   233â†’    },
   234â†’    "readAuthorizerCredential": {
   235â†’      "userTokenSecretVersion": "Â«READ_TOKEN_SECRET_VERSIONÂ»"
   236â†’    },
   237â†’    "webhookSecretSecretVersion": "Â«WEBHOOK_SECRET_VERSIONÂ»"
   238â†’  }
   239â†’}
   240â†’----
   241â†’.. {rbbc_await}
   242â†’returned {gcp_lro}
   243â†’.. {rbbc_store}
   244â†’`Â«CBV2_CONNECTION_NAMEÂ»` as `rbw-Â«INPUT_DEPOT_NAMEÂ»-gitlab`
   245â†’.. {rbbc_poll}
   246â†’link:https://cloud.google.com/build/docs/api/reference/rest/v2/projects.locations.connections/get[connections.get] until `installationState.stage` reaches `COMPLETE`
   247â†’.. {rbbc_require}
   248â†’connection is COMPLETE or {rbbc_warn} diagnostic checklist ({rbbc_fatal} after):
   249â†’... GitLab project access token has `api` scope
   250â†’... Token is a project access token (not personal)
   251â†’... RBRR_RUBRIC_REPO_URL points to correct GitLab project
   252â†’
   253â†’//axhos_step
   254â†’. *Create CB v2 Repository*:
   255â†’.. {rbbc_call}
   256â†’link:https://cloud.google.com/build/docs/api/reference/rest/v2/projects.locations.connections.repositories/create[repositories.create] with:
   257â†’... parent: `projects/Â«DEPOT_PROJECT_IDÂ»/locations/{rbrr_gcp_region}/connections/Â«CBV2_CONNECTION_NAMEÂ»`
   258â†’... repositoryId: `Â«RBGC_CBV2_REPOSITORY_IDÂ»` (constant, currently `rubric`)
   259â†’... body: `{"remoteUri": "Â«RBRR_RUBRIC_REPO_URLÂ»"}`
   260â†’.. {rbbc_await}
   261â†’returned {gcp_lro}
   262â†’.. {rbbc_require}
   263â†’repository created successfully
   264â†’
   265â†’//axhoo_output_of_type
   266â†’{rbtgi_depot}
   267â†’. *Display Depot Configuration*:
   268â†’.. {rbbc_show}
   269â†’depot creation successful
   270â†’.. {rbbc_show}
   271â†’required RBRR configuration values:
   272â†’... `RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID=Â«DEPOT_PROJECT_IDÂ»`
   273â†’... `RBRR_GCP_REGION={rbrr_gcp_region}`
   274â†’... `RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY=Â«GAR_REPOSITORYÂ»`
   275â†’... `RBRR_CBV2_CONNECTION_NAME=Â«CBV2_CONNECTION_NAMEÂ»`
   276â†’.. {rbbc_show}
   277â†’Mason service account: `Â«MASON_EMAILÂ»`
   278â†’.. {rbbc_show}
   279â†’CB v2 connection `Â«CBV2_CONNECTION_NAMEÂ»` active with GitLab
   280â†’.. {rbbc_show}
   281â†’GitLab token stored in Secret Manager (3 secrets: api, read_api, webhook)
   282â†’
   283â†’//axhoo_output_of_type
   284â†’{rbtgi_depot}
   285â†’. *Update Depot Tracking*:
   286â†’.. Execute
   287â†’{rbtoe_depot_list_update}
   288â†’to refresh depot project tracking
   289â†’
   290â†’//axhoc_completion
   291â†’Successful execution creates depot infrastructure with configured build bucket, container repository, Mason service account, CB v2 GitLab connection (COMPLETE), and CB v2 repository linking to the
   292â†’{rbtgr_rubric_repo}.
   293â†’Proceed to
   294â†’{rbtgo_governor_reset}
   295â†’to create the
   296â†’{rbtr_governor}
   297â†’for this depot.
   298â†’

.. If stdin is empty, {rbbc_show} inline setup guide:

     2â†’{rbtgo_depot_create}
     3â†’

     5â†’{rbtgi_depot}

    12â†’creates a new depot infrastructure from the

content.text:
All three changes have been applied correctly. Here is a summary of the edits made to `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/lenses/RBSDC-depot_create.adoc`:

**Change 1 (line 24-26)** -- URL missing case: Added `or {rbbc_show} tabtarget hint for 'rbw-Pgl' then {rbbc_fatal} "Cannot proceed without GitLab rubric repo"` to the regime URL requirement, so when the URL is not set, the user is shown the GitLab setup guide tabtarget before the fatal error.

**Change 2 (line 27-28)** -- URL validation case: Replaced the verbose inline explanation about GitHub vs GitLab PAT scoping with a terse `{rbbc_show} tabtarget hint for 'rbw-Pgl' (GitLab setup guide) then {rbbc_fatal} "Cannot proceed without GitLab rubric repo"`. The rationale about PAT scope differences now lives in `rbgm_gitlab_setup()` (tabtarget `rbw-Pgl`) instead of being inlined in the depot_create spec.

**Change 3 (lines 30-35)** -- stdin section: Replaced the verbose 8-line inline setup guide (with step-by-step GitLab instructions, invocation pattern, and long fatal message) with a terse 4-line block that shows the rubric repo URL, reads the token, and on empty input shows the `rbw-Pgl` tabtarget hint before a short fatal message "Token is empty".
